bank.retain_mission: Extract Unity architecture decisions, editor tooling, multiplayer choices, and shader-graph conventions.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about Unity version, render pipeline (URP/HDRP), multiplayer transport, and editor-tooling patterns. Ignore one-off prefab tweaks.

mental_models.name: Unity Stack
mental_models.source_query: What Unity stack is in use? Version, render pipeline, multiplayer transport, packages.

mental_models.name: Unity Patterns
mental_models.source_query: What patterns work in this Unity project? Architecture, shader-graph conventions, editor-tool ergonomics.
